description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a slender, athletic build and long, flowing hair that extends down the back. The individual is dressed in a form-fitting, full-body suit with contrasting panels on the arms and legs, and wears high-collared, futuristic-looking footwear. The suit features a sleeveless torso section, with the arms covered by a different material or layer, giving a layered appearance. The hands are gloved, and the overall attire suggests a modern or slightly futuristic urban style. The facial features are partially obscured by the hair, which is parted to one side and drapes over the face. The figure stands upright, with arms relaxed at the sides and feet placed close together.
description: A stylized adult figure in a fitted, modern bodysuit with long, flowing hair and futuristic footwear, standing upright with arms at the sides.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fitted bodysuit, sleeveless torso, gloved hands, and long hair partially covering the face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the layered suit design, and the full length of the hair down the back.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the hair's full length and flow, the back panel of the suit, and the symmetrical stance.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the suit's side paneling and the hair's drape over the shoulder.
attribute_clothing_type: form-fitting athletic bodysuit with gloves and high-collared footwear
attribute_hairstyle: long, straight hair with side part and layered strands
